mapper.select: SELECT jp.id, jp.company_profile_id AS companyProfileId, jp.title, cp.company_name AS companyName, u.email AS companyEmail, jp.location, jp.status, jp.view_count AS viewCount, f.file_url AS logoUrl, jp.created_at AS createdAt, jp.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM job_posts jp JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = jp.company_profile_id JOIN users u ON u.id = cp.user_id LEFT JOIN files f ON f.id = cp.logo_file_id WHERE jp.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY jp.created_at DESC, jp.id DESC
SELECT cp.id FROM company_profiles cp JOIN users u ON u.id = cp.user_id WHERE cp.user_id = #{userId} AND u.role = 'COMPANY' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_posts ( company_profile_id, title, description, responsibilities, qualifications, preferred_qualifications, employment_type, experience_level, min_career_years, max_career_years, location, work_type, salary_min, salary_max, salary_negotiable, deadline, status ) VALUES ( #{companyProfileId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{responsibilities}, #{qualifications}, #{preferredQualifications}, #{employmentType}, #{experienceLevel}, #{minCareerYears}, #{maxCareerYears}, #{location}, #{workType}, #{salaryMin}, #{salaryMax}, #{salaryNegotiable}, #{deadline}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE job_posts SET title = #{param.title}, description = #{param.description}, responsibilities = #{param.responsibilities}, qualifications = #{param.qualifications}, preferred_qualifications = #{param.preferredQualifications}, employment_type = #{param.employmentType}, experience_level = #{param.experienceLevel}, min_career_years = #{param.minCareerYears}, max_career_years = #{param.maxCareerYears}, location = #{param.location}, work_type = #{param.workType}, salary_min = #{param.salaryMin}, salary_max = #{param.salaryMax}, salary_negotiable = #{param.salaryNegotiable}, deadline = #{param.deadline}, status = #{param.status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{param.id} AND company_profile_id = #{companyProfileId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE job_posts SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND company_profile_id = #{companyProfileId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE job_posts SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND company_profile_id = #{companyProfileId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_post_sap_skills (job_post_id, sap_skill_id, is_required) VALUES (#{jobPostId}, #{sapSkillId}, TRUE)
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.original_name AS originalName, f.content_type AS contentType, f.file_size AS fileSize, f.file_category AS fileCategory, TO_CHAR(f.created_at, 'YYYY. MM. DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt FROM job_post_attachments jpa JOIN files f ON f.id = jpa.file_id WHERE jpa.job_post_id = #{jobPostId} ORDER BY jpa.id

SELECT jp.id, cp.company_name AS company, f.file_url AS logo_url, cp.website_url, jp.location, jp.title, COALESCE(STRING_AGG(jt.tag_name, ',' ORDER BY jt.id), '') AS tags_csv, jp.deadline, jp.salary_min, jp.salary_max, jp.salary_negotiable, jp.created_at FROM job_posts jp JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = jp.company_profile_id LEFT JOIN files f ON f.id = cp.logo_file_id LEFT JOIN job_tags jt ON jt.job_post_id = jp.id WHERE jp.status = 'OPEN' AND jp.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY jp.id, cp.company_name, f.file_url, cp.website_url, jp.location, jp.title, jp.deadline, jp.salary_min, jp.salary_max, jp.salary_negotiable, jp.created_at ORDER BY jp.created_at DESC, jp.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT jp.id, cp.company_name AS company, f.file_url AS logo_url, cp.website_url, jp.location, jp.title, COALESCE(STRING_AGG(jt.tag_name, ',' ORDER BY jt.id), '') AS tags_csv, jp.deadline, jp.salary_min, jp.salary_max, jp.salary_negotiable, jp.created_at FROM job_bookmarks jb JOIN job_posts jp ON jp.id = jb.job_post_id JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = jp.company_profile_id LEFT JOIN files f ON f.id = cp.logo_file_id LEFT JOIN job_tags jt ON jt.job_post_id = jp.id WHERE jb.user_id = #{userId} AND jp.status = 'OPEN' AND jp.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY jb.created_at, jp.id, cp.company_name, f.file_url, cp.website_url, jp.location, jp.title, jp.deadline, jp.salary_min, jp.salary_max, jp.salary_negotiable, jp.created_at ORDER BY jb.created_at DESC, jp.id DESC
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM job_posts WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'OPEN' AND deleted_at IS NULL )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_bookmarks (user_id, job_post_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{jobPostId}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, job_post_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT jp.id, cp.company_name AS company, jp.title, jp.location, jp.experience_level, jp.status, jp.view_count, jp.created_at, COALESCE(tags.tags_csv, '') AS tags_csv, COALESCE(skills.skills_csv, '') AS skills_csv FROM job_posts jp JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = jp.company_profile_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT job_post_id, STRING_AGG(tag_name, ',' ORDER BY id) AS tags_csv FROM job_tags GROUP BY job_post_id ) tags ON tags.job_post_id = jp.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT jps.job_post_id, STRING_AGG(ss.name, ',' ORDER BY jps.id) AS skills_csv FROM job_post_sap_skills jps JOIN sap_skills ss ON ss.id = jps.sap_skill_id GROUP BY jps.job_post_id ) skills ON skills.job_post_id = jp.id WHERE jp.company_profile_id = #{companyProfileId} AND jp.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY jp.created_at DESC, jp.id DESC

SELECT COALESCE(applications.new_applicant_count, 0) AS newApplicantCount, COALESCE(applications.unread_applicant_count, 0) AS unreadApplicantCount, COALESCE(deadlines.tomorrow_deadline_job_count, 0) AS tomorrowDeadlineJobCount, COALESCE(applications.applicant_count, 0) AS applicantCount FROM company_profiles cp LEFT JOIN ( SELECT jp.company_profile_id, COUNT(*) AS applicant_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ja.applied_at >= CURRENT_DATE) AS new_applicant_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ja.viewed_at IS NULL) AS unread_applicant_count FROM job_applications ja JOIN job_posts jp ON jp.id = ja.job_post_id WHERE jp.deleted_at IS NULL AND ja.status != 'CANCELED' GROUP BY jp.company_profile_id ) applications ON applications.company_profile_id = cp.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT company_profile_id, COUNT(*) AS tomorrow_deadline_job_count FROM job_posts WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'OPEN' AND deadline = CURRENT_DATE + 1 GROUP BY company_profile_id ) deadlines ON deadlines.company_profile_id = cp.id WHERE cp.id = #{companyProfileId}

SELECT jp.id, cp.company_name AS company, jp.title, jp.location, jp.employment_type, jp.experience_level, jp.status, jp.min_career_years, jp.max_career_years, jp.work_type, jp.salary_min, jp.salary_max, jp.salary_negotiable, jp.deadline, jp.view_count, COALESCE(tags.tags_csv, '') AS tags_csv, COALESCE(skills.skills_csv, '') AS skills_csv, jp.description, jp.responsibilities, jp.qualifications, jp.preferred_qualifications FROM job_posts jp JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = jp.company_profile_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT job_post_id, STRING_AGG(tag_name, ',' ORDER BY id) AS tags_csv FROM job_tags GROUP BY job_post_id ) tags ON tags.job_post_id = jp.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT jps.job_post_id, STRING_AGG(ss.name, ',' ORDER BY jps.id) AS skills_csv FROM job_post_sap_skills jps JOIN sap_skills ss ON ss.id = jps.sap_skill_id GROUP BY jps.job_post_id ) skills ON skills.job_post_id = jp.id WHERE jp.id = #{id} AND jp.status = 'OPEN' AND jp.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT jp.id, cp.company_name AS company, jp.title, jp.location, jp.employment_type, jp.experience_level, jp.status, jp.min_career_years, jp.max_career_years, jp.work_type, jp.salary_min, jp.salary_max, jp.salary_negotiable, jp.deadline, jp.view_count, COALESCE(tags.tags_csv, '') AS tags_csv, COALESCE(skills.skills_csv, '') AS skills_csv, jp.description, jp.responsibilities, jp.qualifications, jp.preferred_qualifications FROM job_posts jp JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = jp.company_profile_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT job_post_id, STRING_AGG(tag_name, ',' ORDER BY id) AS tags_csv FROM job_tags GROUP BY job_post_id ) tags ON tags.job_post_id = jp.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT jps.job_post_id, STRING_AGG(ss.name, ',' ORDER BY jps.id) AS skills_csv FROM job_post_sap_skills jps JOIN sap_skills ss ON ss.id = jps.sap_skill_id GROUP BY jps.job_post_id ) skills ON skills.job_post_id = jp.id WHERE jp.id = #{id} AND jp.company_profile_id = #{companyProfileId} AND jp.deleted_at IS NULL
